items.title: New signings help Liverpool spark to life but real test awaits
items.summary: Women's FA Cup fourth‑round victory over fourth-tier London Bees finally offer Liverpool a moment of light in a campaign that has felt extremely bleak.

items.title: VI Live: Sparta countert naar 1-3 in sterke fase Feyenoord
items.summary: Zondagmiddag wordt het Eredivisie-weekend afgesloten door Feyenoord en Sparta Rotterdam. De laatste twee keer dat deze derby werd gespeeld, ging Feyenoord er met een ruime zege (0-4 en 3-0) vandoor. Volg deze wedstrijd in de VI Live.

items.title: Aston Villa v Everton: Premier League – live
items.summary: ⚽ Premier League updates from the 4.30pm GMT kick-off ⚽ Live scores | Tables | Follow us on Bluesky | Mail Billy Premier League report: Will Unwin was at Molineux this afternoon. Let’s hope this one is a bit livelier. The players are in the tunnel, kick-off is in five minutes. Harrison Armstrong, 18, will start his third game in a row for Everton since returning from his loan at Preston. Continue reading...

items.title: 'Moyes will be furious!' | Did VAR wrongly disallow Everton goal?
items.summary: VAR rule out Everton's goal against Aston Villa at Villa Park.

items.title: VI Live: Malen debuteert bij AS Roma, Aston Villa op jacht naar de 1-0
items.summary: Zondag is het Derby Day in de Eredivisie. We trappen af met de Derby van het Noorden tussen SC Heerenveen en FC Groningen, vervolgen met de Twentse Derby Heracles Almelo - FC Twente en sluiten af met het treffen tussen Feyenoord en Sparta Rotterdam, dat in een apart liveblog wordt behandeld. Verder is er ook buitenlands voetbal. Volg het hier in de VI Live.

items.title: Zerrouki bespreekt incident na 0-1 en snapt geen snars van rode kaart
items.summary: Ramiz Zerrouki werd zondagmiddag ongewild de meest besproken man rondom Heracles Almelo – FC Twente . De Algerijns international werd na de 0-1 van Twente belaagd door een ballenjongen, en werd daarna tot zijn eigen verbijstering van het veld gestuurd. Als er een schorsing volgt, is er vanuit Enschede vast beroep aangekondigd.

items.title: Mirani vol ongeloof over penalty: 'Misschien die regel aanpassen'
items.summary: Damon Mirani vindt het onbegrijpelijk dat FC Twente zondag een strafschop kreeg voor een handsbal van de verdediger. De aanvoerder van Heracles Almelo schampte de bal met zijn arm en scheidsrechter Sander van der Eijk wees naar de stip, na inmenging van de VAR.

items.title: Oosting lijdt eerste nederlaag met Antwerp op bezoek bij hekkensluiter
items.summary: Joseph Oosting heeft zijn eerste nederlaag bij Antwerp FC moeten slikken. De oefenmeester ging met zijn ploeg zondagmiddag verrassend onderuit bij hekkensluiter Dender.

items.title: Everton hit the post seconds after kick-off!
items.summary: Everton almost take an early lead at Villa Park!

items.title: Utd's Martinez hits back over 'toddler' criticism
items.summary: Lisandro Martínez has challenged Paul Scholes and Nicky Butt to repeat their criticism to his face after the pair said Erling Haaland would make the Manchester United defender look like "a little toddler" in the Manchester derby.

items.title: Newcastle struggle to find cutting edge in drab stalemate with Wolves
items.summary: Newcastle arrived at Molineux in retro shirts to bring back memories of David Ginola and Les Ferdinand but there was no swagger or flair in their goalless draw against Wolves. There was the potential to go fifth in the Premier League with a win for the Magpies but they toiled on their way to a point instead. With two-thirds of possession throughout the game, Newcastle must have expected to come away with more but they possessed neither the creativity nor finishing. Wolves were worthy of the draw, which leaves them three points shy of Derby’s worst-ever tally of 11, a total many at Molineux, at Christmas, feared would not be overcome. Continue reading...

items.title: Protektorat passes £1m mark with Fleur de Lys win
items.summary: Harry Skelton hailed Protektorat a “warrior” after he successfully defended his crown in the Fitzdares Fleur de Lys Chase at Windsor.

items.title: Police investigating elbow incident in grassroots match
items.summary: Police are investigating an incident in which a football player appeared to deliberately elbow an opponent in the face during a Welsh grassroots match.

items.title: Huge missed chance or a valuable point for Arsenal? Only time will tell
items.summary: Arsenal failed to claim all three points vs. Forest, but their cautious approach might still pay off come May.

items.title: Sources: PSG finalizing deal for Barcelona starlet
items.summary: Paris Saint-Germain are finalising the remaining details for the transfer of Dro Fernández, the latest prodigy from Barcelona's academy, sources confirmed to ESPN.

items.title: Arteta: Arsenal denied clear penalty in Forest draw
items.summary: Mikel Arteta has said Arsenal were denied a "very clear penalty" in Saturday's 0-0 draw at Nottingham Forest.

items.title: Margin for error quickly vanishing for this uninspiring Liverpool side
items.summary: A draw vs. Burnley is the latest disappointment for Liverpool as their dramatic fall from last season continues.

items.title: 'No-one says anything in your face' - Martinez hits back at Scholes and Butt
items.summary: Pundits discussing Man Utd "can talk on the television" but "no-one says anything" to your face, according to defender Lisandro Martinez.

items.title: Spurs board hold talks over Frank future
items.summary: Tottenham head coach Thomas Frank is under increasing pressure to keep his job.

items.title: Raducanu revels in new nickname and eager to 'improve'
items.summary: Emma Raducanu was thrilled with her straight-sets win in the opening round of the Australian Open on Sunday, but insists she can "improve a lot more".
